overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm in a European city. The bus travels along wet city streets with active windshield wipers, making scheduled stops to pick up waiting passengers at designated bus shelters.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with parked vehicles

events.description: bus passes over marked pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: operating the bus along wet city streets with active windshield wipers maintaining steady speed through light rain

entered.detail: driver's instrument panel with speedometer and controls visible throughout the cabin
dual wiper blades sweeping rain from front windshield
rain-slicked street surface with reflections and puddles
multi-story apartment blocks lining the left side of the street
mixed-era buildings with storefronts on the right side
row of mature trees along the left sidewalk
dense tree canopy along the right side of the road
stationary white sedan parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a wet residential street during heavy rain, windshield wipers working continuously. The road is lined with parked cars and mature trees, with multi-story apartment buildings visible on both sides. The interior dashboard and controls are prominently visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: designated bus stop with passenger shelter

events.description: bus slows and comes to complete stop at designated bus stop
front door opens to allow passenger boarding
passengers board the bus through the front entrance

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop, opened front door, and waited for passengers to board

notable_agents.action: woman wearing a hat entering the bus through the front door
older man in dark clothing following behind to board

entered.detail: covered waiting area with glass panels and metal frame
circular red and blue traffic sign on metal pole
raised concrete curb and platform at bus stop

segments.scene_description: The bus slows to a stop at a designated bus shelter. The front door opens and two passengers board sequentially—a woman in a hat followed by an older man. The bus stop features a covered shelter and no-parking signage, with the sidewalk platform visible at the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban thoroughfare with mixed residential and commercial buildings

events.description: bus accelerates away from bus stop and resumes route

agents.ego_description: accelerated from stop and continued along the rainy urban route, maintaining speed through wet conditions

entered.detail: contemporary multi-story residential building with balconies
overhead traffic signal suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Having departed the bus stop, the bus accelerates along the wet thoroughfare. Modern apartment blocks and occasional office buildings line the street, while the windshield wipers continue clearing heavy rain. The road ahead shows traffic signals and parked vehicles along the right curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: second bus stop with passenger shelter and signage

events.description: bus slows to stop at second designated bus stop
front door opens for next group of passengers
multiple passengers board and take seats inside bus

agents.ego_description: approached and stopped at second bus stop, opened doors for waiting passengers to enter

notable_agents.action: group of three passengers waiting under shelter and boarding sequentially

entered.detail: bus stop infrastructure with yellow support pole and overhead shelter
yellow rectangular sign with route numbers and stop name

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and stops at a second bus shelter where a small group of passengers waits. The front door opens and passengers board while standing under the shelter. A yellow bus stop sign is visible near the curb, and parked cars line the street beyond the stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching intersection with overhead signage

events.description: bus departs from second bus stop and continues route

agents.ego_description: departed from second stop and continued driving through wet city streets, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: yellow directional traffic signs mounted over the roadway
road widening and markings indicating upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls away from the second stop and continues through the rainy urban environment. Overhead road signs become visible in the distance as the vehicle approaches an intersection. The street remains lined with trees and residential blocks while rain continues to fall heavily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from the driver's seat as a bus navigates a rain-drenched European residential district through a series of scheduled stops. It begins with the vehicle traveling along a wet street lined with mature trees and apartment buildings, the dashboard prominent in the foreground as windshield wipers battle heavy rain. As the bus slows to a halt at a covered shelter, the front door opens to admit a woman in a hat and an older man before the vehicle accelerates back into the flow of traffic past modern office blocks. The scene then shifts as the bus approaches a second stop, pausing once more to pick up a small group of passengers waiting under a yellow bus stop sign. Finally, the bus pulls away from the curb and continues through the urban environment, moving toward a distant intersection marked by overhead road signs under the persistent downpour.
